title: polyscias myriophylla
intro: Polyscias myriophylla, also known as the Polyscias or Māpou, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. Native to the Pacific Islands, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Polyscias myriophylla include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
